description: load_payment_model_accel registers the Edge TPU delegate with an explicit error-check that returns -1 on delegate failure; the other two loaders are CPU-only and skip the delegate. Unifying onto a shared loader that drops the delegate-with-error-check re-introduces silent CPU fallback at 1/40th throughput.

findings.rationale: load_payment_model_accel has an extra BRANCH on the delegate-registration result that returns -1 — flows to the function's return value. extra-branch shape, on critical path. Should flag cleanly.
